title: senecio pichinchensis
intro: Senecio pichinchensis, also known as Andean groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to South America. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to act as a purgative and to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Senecio pichinchensis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
